curation_notes: Patch commit 3d68bd2 modifies only pkg/expression/util.go (plus test files). The fix replaces a call to NewFunctionInternal (which silently returns nil on failure) with NewFunction (which returns an error), and adds error handling. The pre-assigned class null-deref is correct: CWE-476 maps to null-deref, the advisory explicitly states 'nil pointer dereference in expression.inferCollation', and the patch adds the missing nil/error check. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — the other calls to NewFunctionInternal in util.go are in different code paths with different downstream usage.
